user.title: Configure Nives
user.description: Enter the URL of your Nives API server. Don't have a server? Get a hosted one at [{cloud_url}]({cloud_url}).

data_description.api_token: Required for cloud-hosted Nives. Leave empty for self-hosted setups without authentication.
data_description.user_id: Used to namespace memories per user. Leave as 'default' unless you have multiple users.

hassio_confirm.title: Nives Detected
hassio_confirm.description: The Nives add-on has been detected. Would you like to set it up?

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Nives API. Make sure it's running and accessible.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API token. Check your token on the Nives dashboard.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Nives add-on. Make sure it's running.

data_description.custom_prompt: Custom instructions for the AI personality and behavior. Leave empty to use the default.
